LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD HELD ON APR-15-2015, IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT ERRONEOUSLY UNDERSTOOD THIS MATTER TO BE OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, AND ORDERED AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER ADOBE SOILS AND STRUCTURES ENGINEERING'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: DENISE DOUCETTE, CSR #5963; DEPT. 302 (302/HK)

LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING RE:PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM FEB-26-2015 TO MAR-26-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302. MOVING PARTY DID NOT PROVIDE A COMPLETE COURTESY COPY OF THE PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. THE COURTESY COPY DOES NOT HAVE THE AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE OR ARBITRATION AWARD ATTACHED TO THE PETITION. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE COMPLETE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 26, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. MOTION / Notice Of Motion For Application To Have Court Order Assignment Of All Or Part Of Right To Payment Due Or To Become Due To Judgment Debtor Paul Beamer [Ccp 708.510]
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Defendant Paul Beamer telephone number 415-990-9779 in Propria Persona.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ADOBE SOILS AND STRUCTURES ENGINEERING'S Motion For Application To Have Court Order Assignment Of All Or Part Of Right To Payment Due Or To Become Due To Judgment Debtor Paul Beamer [CCP 708.510] is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/EG)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Continued To Dec-17-15 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 514

Notice Of Hearing Re Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award. Reservation No. 021715-12
Off Calendar Apr-15-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. A. BARCLAY BYRNES of Archer Norris APLC, Tel No. (925) 930-6600 appearing for the Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court erroneously understood this matter to be off calendar. The Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: PETITIONER ADOBE SOILS AND STRUCTURES ENGINEERING'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. The arbitration award is confirmed. PETITIONER'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT FOR SIGNATURE. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR #5963 (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing Re:Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-26-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ADOBE SOILS AND STRUCTURES ENGINEERING'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is taken OFF-CALENDAR PER THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing Re:Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-26-2015 Continued To Mar-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER ADOBE SOILS AND STRUCTURES ENGINEERING CONTRACTORS, INC.'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to March 26, 2015. Moving party did not provide a complete courtesy copy of the Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award. The courtesy copy does not have the agreement to arbitrate or arbitration award attached to the petition. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the complete moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than February 26, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
